overall.description: A first-person walk along a wooden ocean pier at dusk in a video game (GTA V), featuring a dramatic sunset sky with purple and pink hues over the water. The camera approaches and passes through a pair of white wooden buildings at the pier's end, then turns to view the open ocean before turning again to observe the coastline with distant city lights.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide wooden pier at dusk, with the camera walking steadily toward two white buildings at the far end. Green benches and trash cans line the walkway, while white railings flank both sides. The ocean stretches to the horizon under a dramatic sunset sky. Near the end of the segment, two NPCs appear standing on the left side, conversing near the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered passage between two white wooden pier buildings

events.description: entering the narrow enclosed passage between the two white buildings
exiting the narrow passage back to open air with ocean view ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor between the two white buildings, passing under an overhead connecting walkway

entered.detail: wooden walkway bridge connecting the two buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow enclosed passage between the two white buildings, transitioning from open sky to a sheltered corridor with artificial lighting from building windows. The twin buildings now flank the path on both sides at close range, connected by an overhead bridge. The segment ends as the camera exits back to open air with the ocean visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pier edge overlooking ocean at sunset

events.description: turning right to face the open ocean and sunset horizon

agents.ego_description: turning to face the ocean and walking along the pier edge, observing the sunset over the water

entered.detail: wooden posts and beams supporting the building overhang on the right side
vibrant pink and purple sunset glow on the horizon over the ocean

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow passage, the camera turns right to face the open ocean, revealing a stunning sunset horizon with vibrant pink and purple hues. The walkway continues along the pier edge with wooden support structures visible on the right, while the ocean stretches endlessly ahead under the dramatic dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier overlook with view of coastline and distant city lights

events.description: turning left to face the shoreline and coastal city lights

agents.ego_description: turning to face the coastline and walking along the pier, observing the beach, mountains, and distant illuminated buildings

entered.detail: sandy beach visible along the shoreline
dark mountain range silhouetted against the night sky
scattered warm lights from buildings along the coastline
string lights illuminating the distant extension of the pier

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to face the shoreline, revealing a panoramic view of the coastal landscape. The beach stretches along the water's edge with a dark mountain silhouette rising behind it, while warm lights from distant buildings dot the coastline. The pier's extension with decorative lights is visible to the right, and the ocean now lies to the left as dusk settles into night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a wooden pier at dusk that transitions from an open walkway through a sheltered corridor and finally to a panoramic coastal vista. It begins by moving steadily toward two white buildings, passing green benches and white railings under a dramatic sunset sky while two NPCs converse by the side. As the camera reaches the end of the pier, it enters a narrow enclosed passage between the buildings, shifting from the open air to a sheltered corridor with artificial window lighting and an overhead bridge. The scene then opens back up to the ocean as the camera exits the passage and turns right to face a horizon saturated with vibrant pink and purple hues. Finally, the camera turns left to reveal the shoreline, where the beach and dark mountain silhouettes are dotted with warm distant lights as the dusk settles into night.
